Invoke SpawnObject.Spawn on 'Move Up Button' to instantiate prefab 'Box' (fileID 6150933721197494150) at spawnPosition = Transform id 7863669396577847637. MonoBehaviour mapping: SpawnObject (id 839586645, guid a658f19182a575a46b14f720a8e295a7) matches scene meta. XRButton (id 3016069959630375334, guid acde65f5db6773e49ad668404cf55472) defines OnPress UnityEvent with parameterized calls (TranslateObject.TranslateY(0.1), PlaySoundsFromList.PlayAtIndex(0)) which cannot be invoked directly via Trigger without XR interaction.

MonoBehaviour_0 (id: 1718703368) on GameObject 'Controls' maps to script guid 866d134ae31a01841b6156f8d0a87054, which matches the provided TranslateObject class. Start() runs automatically at play, initializing startPos/startRot. To cover the only public no-parameter API, invoke TranslateObject.ResetToStartingPosition(). No m_Calls defined on this component; additional interactions may exist on child objects with colliders/events to drive parameterized TranslateX/Y/Z and SetLocal* methods.

XRButton (MonoBehaviour_1 id: 3016069960143379342, guid: acde65f5db6773e49ad668404cf55472) on 'Reset Button' defines OnPress UnityEvent with persistent calls to multiple TranslateObject.ResetToStartingPosition() targets and one PlaySoundsFromList.PlayAtIndex(3). Manual XR hover/press is not available; we directly invoke the no-parameter ResetToStartingPosition() methods to mirror OnPress behavior. RemoveObjectsWithTag (MonoBehaviour_0 id: 1824525328, guid: 67ddb01715fbbc34fb1b56a1a852d398) is present but not wired in m_Calls and its RemoveObjects(string tag) cannot be invoked via Trigger (requires parameter).

XRLever (MonoBehaviour_0 id: 5754956525560203020, guid: e601cf28e9702c945abe3b90e7f51974) is attached to 'Lever' and matches the provided script. Its defaultValue is true, so Start() will automatically call SetValue(true), which invokes OnLeverActivate. OnLeverActivate has m_PersistentCalls to: (1) call SetOriginalLayer() on component fileID 7541936460893253790 (no parameters) and (2) call PlaySoundsFromList.PlayAtIndex(0) on component fileID 1145393436748058495. These will be triggered automatically at scene start; no manual trigger is required to cover them. To also cover OnLeverDeactivate, we need a way to toggle the lever to false (e.g., via XR selection/exit or a public no-arg API), but XRLever exposes no public parameterless method for this and we cannot drive XR controllers directly per constraints. Please provide the child objects with colliders/handles (handle id: 7509008427246001996; collider id referenced: 5238779549397348332; children: 9152294701888420776, 7509008427246001996, 3728792975646475010) or any additional public no-arg methods to invoke.

XRKnob is confirmed: MonoBehaviour_0 (id: 774548518, guid: 65a8500fa86faa04596fb5f9d40efeae) on 'Knob'. Start() initializes rotation/value and invokes OnValueChange internally (no persistent calls in scene). To cover UnityEvent-driven audio behavior, mirror XR select interactions: OnSelectEntered -> PlayContinuousSound.Play() and OnSelectExited -> PlayContinuousSound.Pause() on script fileID 4079354613688537254. These are parameterless MonoBehaviour methods and can be invoked directly.

MonoBehaviour_0 (fileID: 341662333) on 'Audio Source' is PlaySoundsFromList (guid: 76a895b5e674db04d8b4f8110c068852) and requires an AudioSource (component fileID: 341662332). No Collider/Rigidbody/EventTrigger present, so these public parameterless methods must be invoked directly by the test harness to exercise behavior: PlayCurrentClip, NextClip, PreviousClip, RandomClip, PauseClip, StopClip.
